sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (julian_day Int32, label String);
SELECT fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(julian_day) AS date_transformed FROM test_dates WHERE label LIKE 'D%';
SELECT *, (SELECT fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(julian_day) FROM test_dates WHERE label LIKE 'D%') AS subquery_date FROM test_dates;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int32, julian_day Int32, description String);
SELECT a.id, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(a.julian_day) AS transformed_date FROM test_dates AS a JOIN test_join AS b ON a.julian_day = b.julian_day AND b.description LIKE '%First';
SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates WHERE fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(julian_day) IS NULL GROUP BY label HAVING count(*) > 0;

SELECT label, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates WHERE label LIKE 'D%') AS count_labels, fromModifiedJulianDayOrNull(MAX(julian_day)) AS max_date FROM test_dates GROUP BY label HAVING max_date IS NOT NULL;
